form.formComment: Most recently 4th of 9 at this track on April 2 over 1800m, 2.25 len behind Tomahawk carrying 59kg at $21. The start before that 10th of 15 at Sakhir on March 21 over 2200m, 6 len behind December with 57.5kg at $17. This looks too tough.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 49-day let-up. At the latest run second last of 8 at Sakhir in BHRG2 on February 19 over 1600m, 23 len behind Pheonix with 58kg at $19. The run before that ran last of 9 at this track in BHRG2 on January 23 over 1400m, 13 len behind Night Lantern carrying 58kg at $15. Genuine chance this time around.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Ran too free during the early stages of the race.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after two months 5th of 10 at Sakhir on April 3 over 1600m, 7 len behind Night Lantern with 57kg at $5.50. Previously second-up 6th of 15 at Sakhir on November 28 over 1800m, 3 len behind Perast carrying 58kg at $5. Fitter again and a winning hope.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation ninth of 11 at this track January 29 over 1000m, 5 len behind The Ghost Ship carrying 59kg at $12. When resuming last campaign fourth in a small field at Sakhir in the BHRG2 November 28 over 1200m, 13 len behind Zeal with 56kg at $101. Others make more appeal.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung right-handed in the home straight.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation when last in a small field at Sakhir in the BHRG1 January 30 over 2000m, 22 len behind Baraak carrying 58kg at $21. Previous preparation first-up won by 0.8 len Sakhir January 2 over 2000m defeating Bairaq with 57kg at $3. Useful type who should go well.
